name: figma-fetcher
description: Auto-delegating Haiku sub-agent that offloads Figma MCP read calls (get_design_context, get_screenshot, get_metadata, get_variable_defs, get_code_connect_map) out of the main conversation. Caches the full payload to tmp/figma/{fileKey}__{nodeId}.json plus a sibling .png and returns a small markdown digest. Read-only; requires the official Figma MCP server.
